pkgmetadata.longdescription: Jieba is a Chinese text segmentation library for Python. It supports three segmentation modes: accurate mode, full mode, and search engine mode. It also supports custom dictionaries and keyword extraction.
结巴分词是一个Python中文分词库。它支持三种分词模式：精确模式、全模式 和搜索引擎模式。同时支持自定义词典和关键词提取功能。
